creator: keichii@bsdconspiracy.net
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/docs.html 
Under the Manual Search/Info Doc  section, it says 
4.0-current instead of what it should be. 
Also the man page search engine has the same mistake.
I do not know about the man page search engine and was
unable to provide a patch.

Sorry to be of trouble.
